---
title: "Introduction to `sifter` package"
author: "authors: Artur Gramacki & Jarosław Gramacki"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true  
    fig_caption: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to `sift` package}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

<style>

body {
  background-color: #ffffff;
}

pre {
  border: 1px solid #3b82f6;
  border-radius: 6px;
}

h1, h2, h3, h4 {
  border-bottom: none;
}


</style>

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE)
```

```{r old_par, include = FALSE}
old.par <- par("mfrow", "mai", "pty")
```

## R version and generation time

```{r R_version, include = TRUE, echo = FALSE}
out <- version
cat(
  "R version:    ", 
  out$major, ".", 
  out$minor, 
  "\n", 
  "Generated on: ", 
  format(Sys.time(), "%d-%B-%Y"), 
  sep = ""
)
```
## Loading the package

```{r load_library}
library(sifter)
```
